components.name: Cell Row
components.description: Single data cell for table rows. Maps to <TableCell> with p-md align-middle. Type=Text renders text content; Type=Checkbox renders a selection checkbox with compact padding. Alignment controls horizontal text position. Weight controls font weight for emphasis (Medium for primary column like Invoice).

examples.name: Type
examples.description: Text cell for data content and Checkbox cell for row selection.

examples.name: Weight
examples.description: Regular weight for secondary columns, Medium weight for primary column emphasis.

examples.name: Alignment
examples.description: Left-aligned for text content, Right-aligned for numeric values (amounts, totals).

related.name: Table Row
related.desc: Parent row composing Cell Row instances for data display.

related.name: Cell Header
related.desc: Header cell counterpart — used inside Table Header.

related.name: Checkbox
related.desc: Instanced inside Type=Checkbox cells for row selection.

components.name: Cell Header
components.description: Single header cell for table headers. Maps to <TableHead> with h-3xl px-md text-muted-foreground font-medium. Type=Text renders column heading; Type=Checkbox renders a select-all checkbox with compact padding. Alignment controls horizontal text position.

examples.name: Type
examples.description: Text cell for column headings and Checkbox cell for select-all.

examples.name: Alignment
examples.description: Left-aligned for text columns, Right-aligned for numeric columns.

related.name: Table Header
related.desc: Parent header row composing Cell Header instances.

related.name: Cell Row
related.desc: Data cell counterpart — used inside Table Row.

related.name: Checkbox
related.desc: Instanced inside Type=Checkbox cells for select-all.

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Single data row composing Cell Row instances. State controls row highlighting (hover=muted/50, selected=muted). Striped adds alternating tint (muted/30). Checkbox prepends a selection checkbox cell. Stack instances vertically below a Table Header to compose full tables.

examples.name: Row States
examples.description: Default (no fill), hover (muted/50), and selected (muted) backgrounds.

examples.name: Checkbox
examples.description: Data row with and without selection checkbox.

examples.name: Border
examples.description: Border=Yes for regular rows with bottom separator, Border=No for last row in table body (no bottom border).

examples.name: Striped
examples.description: Alternating row tint (muted/30) for improved readability in dense tables.

props.name: Table
props.description: Wraps <table> in overflow-auto div for horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

props.name: TableHeader
props.description: Wraps <thead>, adds border-b to child rows

props.name: TableBody
props.description: Wraps <tbody>, removes border from last row

props.name: TableFooter
props.description: Wraps <tfoot> with border-t and bg-muted/50 for summary rows

props.name: TableHead
props.description: Wraps <th> with scope='col', h-3xl px-md, text-muted-foreground font-medium

props.name: TableCaption
props.description: Wraps <caption> with mt-md text-sm text-muted-foreground, renders below table

designTokens.description: TableRow bottom border, TableFooter top border
Row hover (50%), selected (100%), striped (30%), footer background (50%)
TableHead text color, TableCaption text color
TableCell text color
Cell padding (p-md on TableCell, px-md on TableHead)

bestPractices.do: Use semantic Table sub-components for all multi-column data — screen readers announce column headers to each cell.
bestPractices.dont: Use div/grid layouts to simulate a table — they lose the row/column relationship for assistive technology.

bestPractices.do: Apply data-state='selected' on TableRow to highlight selected rows — the selected style is built in.
bestPractices.dont: Use a custom background color class for selection — it bypasses the design token and breaks dark mode.

bestPractices.do: Use table-fixed with explicit column widths when column content varies — prevents layout shift on data update.
bestPractices.dont: Let all columns auto-size — variable-length content causes columns to jump width between pages.

figmaMapping.value: Text-only data row with Cell Row instances

keyboard.action: Move focus through interactive elements inside cells (buttons, links, inputs)
Activate focused interactive element within a cell

notes: TableHead automatically adds scope='col' — screen readers announce which column each header belongs to.
For row headers (first column identifying each row), add scope='row' to those TableCell elements manually.
TableCaption is announced as the table's accessible name — prefer it over an external heading.
For sortable columns, add aria-sort='ascending' | 'descending' | 'none' to the TableHead element.

related.name: Cell Row
related.desc: Sub-component — individual data cells instanced inside Table Row.

related.name: Table Header
related.desc: Header row placed above Table Row instances inside the Table parent.

related.name: Pagination
related.desc: Pair with Table for paginated data — renders below the table container.

related.name: Checkbox
related.desc: Use inside TableCell for row selection — the component handles alignment automatically.

related.name: Badge
related.desc: Use inside TableCell for status columns — variant='success/warning/destructive' with level='secondary'.

components.name: Table Header
components.description: Header row composing Cell Header instances for column headings. Renders with muted-foreground text, font-medium weight, and fixed 40px height via Cell Header sub-components. Checkbox property adds a select-all checkbox as the first column. Use as the first instance inside a Table parent.

examples.name: Header Variants
examples.description: Default header row and header with select-all checkbox.

props.name: TableHead
props.description: Wraps <th> with scope='col', h-3xl px-md, text-muted-foreground font-medium

props.name: TableHeader
props.description: Wraps <thead>, adds border-b to the header row

designTokens.description: Bottom border separating header from body rows
Hover state background (muted/50)
Header text color
Cell horizontal padding (px-md via Cell Header)
Fixed header cell height (h-3xl via Cell Header)

bestPractices.do: Use one Table Header instance at the top of each Table — it provides column context for all data rows below.
bestPractices.dont: Stack multiple Table Header instances — one header row per table.

bestPractices.do: Enable Checkbox=Yes when the table supports row selection — pairs with Checkbox inside Table Row cells.
bestPractices.dont: Add a checkbox column manually via extra frames — use the built-in Checkbox property.

figmaMapping.value: Text-only header with Cell Header instances

keyboard.action: Move focus to checkbox (when present) or skip to body

notes: TableHead adds scope='col' automatically — screen readers announce column headers.
Select-all checkbox should toggle all row checkboxes — use indeterminate state for partial selection.

related.name: Cell Header
related.desc: Sub-component — individual header cells instanced inside Table Header.

related.name: Table
related.desc: Parent container — place Table Header as the first child instance.

related.name: Table Row
related.desc: Data rows placed below Table Header inside the Table parent.

related.name: Checkbox
related.desc: Used inside Cell Header Type=Checkbox for select-all functionality.

components.name: Table Card Row
components.description: A justify-between flex row inside TableCard. Maps to <TableCardRow> with flex items-center justify-between. Used for label-value pairs in mobile card view of table data.

examples.name: Row Content
examples.description: Label-value pair rows for mobile card layout.

related.name: Table Card
related.desc: Parent card composing Table Card Row instances for mobile table view.

related.name: Table Row
related.desc: Desktop counterpart — full table row with cell instances.

components.name: Table Card
components.description: Mobile card representation of a table row. Maps to <TableCard> with rounded-xl border p-md flex-col gap-sm. Used below md breakpoint as a responsive alternative to the full Table. Hover state raises surface background. Compose with Table Card Row instances for label-value pairs.

examples.name: Card States
examples.description: Default and hover states for mobile table card.

props.name: TableCard
props.description: Rounded card container for mobile table row — flex-col gap-sm with border and hover:bg-surface-raised

props.name: TableCardRow
props.description: Justify-between flex row for label-value pairs inside TableCard

designTokens.description: Card border color
Hover state background fill
Value text color
Label text color
Card padding
Gap between rows
Card border radius

bestPractices.do: Use TableCard below md breakpoint as a responsive alternative to the full Table component.
bestPractices.dont: Show both Table and TableCard at the same breakpoint — use responsive visibility (hidden md:block / md:hidden).

bestPractices.do: Compose with TableCardRow for consistent label-value pair spacing.
bestPractices.dont: Use bare divs inside TableCard — TableCardRow handles justify-between alignment.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the card (cursor: pointer)

notes: TableCard uses cursor: pointer — ensure onClick or Link wrapping for keyboard access.
Label-value pairs in TableCardRow are visually associated — consider aria-label for screen readers.

related.name: Table Card Row
related.desc: Sub-component — label-value rows instanced inside Table Card.

related.name: Table
related.desc: Desktop counterpart — full table with rows and cells.

related.name: Table Row
related.desc: Desktop row counterpart composing Cell Row instances.

related.name: Card
related.desc: Generic card — TableCard is specialized for table data representation.

components.name: Table
components.description: Full data table composing Table Header and Table Row instances via instance swap. Header at top, data rows below with multi-column data via Cell sub-components. Striped property toggles alternating row tint for improved readability in dense tables.

examples.name: Default
examples.description: Standard table with header and 3 data rows — no striping.

examples.name: Striped
examples.description: Alternating row tint (muted/30) for improved readability in dense tables.

props.description: Wraps <table> in overflow-auto div for horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

props.description: Wraps <thead>, adds border-b to child rows

props.name: TableBody
props.description: Wraps <tbody>, removes border from last row

designTokens.description: Row bottom border from Table Row child instances
Striped row tint (30%), hover (50%), selected (100%) via Table Row
Header text color via Table Header > Cell Header
Data cell text color via Table Row > Cell Row

bestPractices.do: Swap Table Row instances to change row state, striped, or checkbox — the parent handles layout only.
bestPractices.dont: Add extra frames or dividers between rows — Table Row already has border-b built in.

bestPractices.do: Use Striped=On for tables with 5+ rows — alternating tint improves row tracking.
bestPractices.dont: Combine Striped with custom row backgrounds — they compete visually.

keyboard.action: Move focus through interactive elements inside cells
Activate focused interactive element within a cell

notes: Compose with TableHeader > TableRow > TableHead for accessible column headers.
TableCaption provides the table's accessible name — place inside Table component.
For sortable columns, add aria-sort to TableHead elements.
